title: 2. Needle MenJin (66.05) and HuoJu (66.11)

Pleurisy - inflammation of the pleura, characterized by pain that is aggravated by deep breathing or coughing
Pleura - the thin transparent serous membrane enveloping the lungs and lining the walls of the thoracic cavity
Neuralgia - sharp and paroxysmal pain along the course of a nerve.
